    Talk To Us

    Don’t Let Infrastructure Delay Your AI ROI

    The NVIDIA DGX™-Ready Colocation Data Center program certifies data centers worldwide, providing an optimized environment for AI deployment on the NVIDIA DGX platform. Delivered by NVIDIA partners, the program leverages the most energy-efficient and high-performance centers globally, along with a broad range of services—including modern data centers, interconnectivity, and liquid-cooling solutions—to accelerate the scaling of AI across your organization.

    The Blueprint for Next-Gen AI Data Centers

    Proven Liquid-Cooling Deployments

    NVIDIA's liquid-cooled supercomputing expertise, honed in our AI factories, is built into our reference architectures for colocation partners, ensuring peak performance and efficiency for DGX infrastructure.

    Stringent Component Validation Process

    Our validation program ensures electrical, cooling, and control products align with NVIDIA’s standards, with component technology providers undergoing rigorous testing to ensure quality and reliability.

    Comprehensive Ecosystem Support

    Collaboration with technology providers ensures AI infrastructure stays modular and reliable as power and cooling needs grow, providing cutting-edge solutions for customers now and in the future.

    Powering Sustainable Data Centers

    Combined with our partners' sustainable operations and innovation in data center design, DGX systems allow enterprises to sustainably and cost-effectively scale AI transformation.

    Sustainable Computing Solutions

    Supercharging Speed, Efficiency, and Savings

    Each generation of NVIDIA DGX systems delivers more performance per petaFLOP over prior generations, enabling enterprises to tackle the most complex AI problems with even greater efficiency. Numerous DGX systems are recognized among the world’s most energy-efficient supercomputers, earning spots on the Green500 list.

    Innovations With State-of-the-Art Liquid Cooling Technology

    As trillion-parameter models surge, businesses are rapidly deploying AI, demanding high-performance, energy-efficient solutions. Next-gen data centers with advanced power and cooling, like liquid and hybrid-air liquid systems, are crucial for maximizing performance, reducing energy use, and cutting costs.

    Watch Video

    What Benefits Are Customers Experiencing?

    Continental Fast-Tracks AI Learning for Safer Vehicles

    Continental’s Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS) team needed to store and process more than 150 terabytes (TB) of data and make it quickly accessible by hundreds of engineers worldwide. They leveraged Platform Equinix to build and interconnect their AI-driven NVIDIA DGX cluster, improving AI training time by 70 percent.

    Continental accelerates AI learning with Platform Equinix to make vehicles safer

    Peptone Accelerates Therapeutics Development

    To build a repository of proteins, Peptone must analyze huge amounts of data. Verne Global's data center provides Peptone with high-density, high-performance compute powered by DGX systems. Using one of the most reliable and affordable power grids ensures Peptone can run their high-throughput workflows while decreasing their carbon footprint and TCO.

    Peptone accelerates drug discovery at Verne Global’s NVIDIA DGX Campus

    Harrison.ai Speeds Development of AI-Based Health Tech

    Equinix hosts petabytes of data across an extensive array of NVIDIA DGX systems for Harrison.ai. With access to powerful computing resources globally, Harrison.ai's AI model training has gone from months to days. Rapid experimentation has enabled them to deliver an AI solution that increased radiologists' diagnostic accuracy of chest x-rays by 45 percent.

    harrison.ai accelerates development of AI-based health tech platform

    What Customers Are Saying About Our DGX-Ready Colocation Partners

    With the performance, flexibility, and scalability of the new GPU cluster, Continental improved AI training time by 70 percent using IBM Spectrum Scale and NVIDIA DGX systems on Platform Equinix.  

    — Balázs Lóránd, Head of AI Development Centre in Budapest, Business Area Autonomous Mobility, Continental AG

    The priority for us at Peptone is to deliver results quickly due to the real-world impact this research has in developing life-saving, protein-based drugs. To do this, we needed a data center partner optimized for high-performance computing that could also cope with the fast-changing and high-scalable nature of the compute.

    — Dr. Kamil Tamiola, Founder and CEO, Peptone (Verne Global customer)

    Equinix offers harrison.ai and its ventures access to world-class, secure hosting of our compute and data storage platforms, which is our highest technical priority as we are building AI solutions for clinicians across the world.

    — Aengus Tran, CEO and Co-founder, harrison.ai

    What Our Partners Are Doing

    1. Digital Realty
    2. Equinix
    3. Flexential
    4. Fujitsu
    5. Verne Global

    Deploy on a Large Global Platform

    With over 310 data centers across 25 countries, Digital Realty's PlatformDIGITAL provides secure and scalable colocation services with DGX systems, along with interconnection services that provide unparalleled connectivity while managing data gravity challenges. With 34 Energy Star-certified data centers, Digital Realty was awarded the Energy Star Partner of the Year by the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) for their energy-efficiency efforts.

    Learn More About Digital Realty

    Streamline Hybrid AI Infrastructure

    In 71 markets across six continents, Platform Equinix enables enterprises to support training on premises with DGX systems, tap into cloud services as needed, and extend AI workloads at the edge. In addition to secure colocation services, Equinix Fabric interconnection solutions and digital services improve data management and let enterprises easily and securely scale hybrid deployments. Using these solutions, Equinix offers a turnkey, ready-to-run AI development platform, Equinix Private AI with NVIDIA DGX, backed by a team of AI experts. With 96 percent renewables coverage of their data centers and a focus on design for the environment, enterprises can scale sustainably without compromise.

    Learn More About Equinix

    Deliver Highly Efficient Data Centers

    Flexential offers secure, redundant, and high-density-power colocation data centers powered by DGX systems and the FlexAnywhere platform. Reduce costs with Flexential Interconnection, which provides high-performance connectivity, and data centers that are highly efficient with low power usage effectiveness (PUE) in the range of 1.25–1.40, a water usage effectiveness (WUE) of zero, and Energy Star efficiency-rated uninterruptible power supply (UPS) systems.

    Learn More About Flexential

    Ensure the Highest Level of Security

    Fujitsu provides a highly secure, flexible, and cost-effective solution for your colocation needs. Fujitsu's facilities are JDCC Tier 4 level with the highest security and robustness in the country. They also provide a DC Cloud Network that connects data centers and cloud services securely and seamlessly, based on the Fujitsu Cloud Service infrastructure.

    Learn More About Fujitsu

    Lower Operating Cost and Reduce Reliance on Energy-Intensive Resources

    Verne Global offers scalable and secure colocation services and ultra-high-density clusters powered by DGX systems. Predictably priced and powered by 100 percent renewable energy, along with high-capacity connectivity to hundreds of global services, Verne Global ensures cost-effective, scalable services with zero compromise.

    Learn More About Verne Global

    Colocation Partners

    NVIDIA partners with providers offering both air-cooled and advanced liquid-cooled data centers, where liquid cooling uses fluids to efficiently remove heat from servers, enabling higher performance and energy savings in high-density computing environments.

    Talk to Us

    Aligned Data Centers

    Aligned Data Centers is a leading infrastructure technology company empowering global hyperscale and enterprise customers to achieve unprecedented performance with high-density, sustainable data center solutions. Aligned offers build-to-scale (build-to-suit) and scale (managed colocation) data centers designed for the deployment of high-performance computing (HPC) infrastructure and GPU clusters.

    Our intelligent and scalable infrastructure allows densification and vertical growth within the same footprint, enabling customers to scale beyond 300kW per rack without disruption, all while maintaining industry-leading power usage effectiveness (PUE). Aligned's cutting-edge cooling technologies (DeltaFlow~™ liquid cooling and Delta3™ air cooling) are specifically designed to handle the thermal demands of NVIDIA DGX™ deep learning, AI, and HPC applications.

    Subregions

    U.S.: Illinois, Maryland, Utah, Texas, Virginia, Ohio, Oregon, Arizona; Canada: Quebec City; LATAM: Brazil, Colombia, Mexico, Chile

    Contact

    www.aligneddc.com

    sales@alignedenergy.com

    AUBix

    AUBix LLC is a multi-tenant, mission-critical data center bringing technology parity to underserved communities across Alabama. The secure, compliant infrastructure will boost efficiency and cost-effectiveness with carrier-neutral services and deep technology expertise. AUBix high-density power and cooling technology supports NVIDIA DGX™ computing—such as artificial intelligence, machine learning, and high-performance computing—to accommodate the fastest GPU super-node computers in the market today.

    Subregions

    Alabama

    Contact

    www.aubix.net

    Colovore

    Based in Santa Clara, Colovore is the leading provider of high-performance colocation solutions for the deployment of high-performance computing (HPC) infrastructure and GPU servers. With 35 kilowatt (kW) of power and cooling capacity in every cabinet and a pay-by-the-kW pricing model, our data center is optimized to support artificial intelligence, machine learning, big data, and Internet of Things applications. With unrivaled power and cooling densities, we allow customers to optimize IT footprints by deploying in the most compact space, reducing costs, and significantly improving I.T. scalability.

    With close to 1,000 NVIDIA DGX™-1s and DGX-2s already running in their data center, Colovore offers you a centralized Silicon Valley resource for NVIDIA and HPC servers.

     Liquid Cooled Ready

    Subregions

    U.S. West

    Contact

    www.colovore.com/nvidia-dgx-ready

    CoreSite

    CoreSite, an American Tower company, provides a national portfolio of high-density-powered data centers for NVIDIA high-performance computing (HPC) and AI. Their highly interconnected data center campuses offer a native digital supply chain with direct cloud on-ramps that enable their customers to build customized hybrid IT infrastructure and accelerate digital transformation. For over 20 years, CoreSite’s team of technical experts has partnered with enterprises, cloud, network, and IT service providers to optimize operations, elevate customer experiences, dynamically scale, and leverage data to gain a competitive edge.

    Subregions

    Los Angeles and Silicon Valley, California; Chicago, Illinois; Virginia

    Contact

    www.coresite.com

    CyrusOne

    CyrusOne specializes in providing highly reliable, flexible, and scalable enterprise data center colocation services. They have a broad portfolio of carrier-neutral data center facilities in the United States, Europe, South America, and Asia. CyrusOne employs a Massively Modular engineering and design approach to optimize design and construction materials sourcing and enable just-in-time data hall inventory to meet customer demand. The company engineers their facilities with redundant power technology, including an available 2N architecture. CyrusOne customers can mix and match data centers to create their own production and/or disaster recovery platforms by combining facilities via the low-cost, robust interconnectivity provided by the CyrusOne National Internet Exchange (IX).

    Subregions

    U.S. East, South, and West

    Contact

    www.cyrusone.com

    DataBank is a leading provider of enterprise-class edge colocation, interconnection, and managed services. The company helps the world’s largest enterprises, technology, and content providers ensure their data and applications are always on, always secure, always compliant, and ready to scale to meet the needs of the artificial intelligence era.

    CDC

    Established in 2007, CDC has grown to become the pre-eminent owner-operator and developer of highly secure, connected and sovereign data centers across Australia and New Zealand.

    Specializing in world-leading critical infrastructure capabilities, CDC has established itself as the foremost destination for customers who cannot – and will not – compromise on their digital critical infrastructure.

    CDC offers sustainable, innovative, customer-led solutions to meet the requirements of the constantly evolving digital and data landscapes. Together with our customers, we ensure that society always has access to the systems essential for progress.

    NEXTDC

    NEXTDC is an Australian technology company offering colocation services through the delivery of mission critical infrastructure and interconnectivity solutions which connect customers to Australia’ largest ecosystem of global and sovereign cloud platforms, service providers and technology providers. As a leading independent data center operator with a national network of Tier IV facilities, NEXTDC provides highly resilient data center solutions to ensure ongoing technology innovation enabled by accelerated computing and powered by the NVIDIA DGX platform. With a strategic focus on sustainability and renewable energy, our industry leading capabilities champion the best energy efficiency ratings for data center services in the country.

    Cyxtera

    Cyxtera Technologies combines a worldwide footprint of 50+ best-in-class data centers with a portfolio of modern, cloud- and hybrid-ready security and analytics offerings.     Digital Realty

    Digital Realty is the largest provider of data center colocation services globally. Digital Realty brings companies and data together by delivering the full spectrum of high-performance data center, colocation, and interconnection solutions required to support your NVIDIA DGX™ systems. PlatformDIGITAL, the company’s global data center platform, provides customers with a secure data “meeting place” for powering innovation and efficiently managing data gravity challenges.

    Digital Realty’s software-defined networking (SDN)-based ServiceFabric solution is designed to support the wider industry shift to data-centric architecture and act as a global orchestration platform to manage global connectivity. NVIDIA DGX customers can securely host critical infrastructure and datasets, connect to whom they need, and deploy and manage their infrastructure where they need it to enable new workflows and unlock new business outcomes.

    Digital Realty gives their customers access to the connected communities that matter to them with a global data center footprint of 305+ facilities in 50+ metros across 27 countries on six continents.

    EdgeConnex

    Wherever it is, your edge needs power, cooling, and a tier 3 service-level agreement (SLA). EdgeConneX experts work to identify and deploy innovative power solutions that you can rely on for today's—and tomorrow's—high-density demands.

    EdgeConneX sites offer high-density power that can accommodate NVIDIA DGX™ deep learning, AI, and high-performance computing technologies. And with their experience building data centers at any scale—from hyperlocal to hyperscale—they're poised to provide virtually any end-to-end power solution that you require.

    Equinix

    Equinix, Inc., connects the world's leading businesses to their customers, employees, and partners inside the most-interconnected data centers in 71 markets across six continents. To simplify IT operations, Equinix also offers a turnkey, ready-to-run AI development platform that can bridge on-premises and the cloud with Equinix Private AI with NVIDIA DGX, hosted and managed by Equinix and backed by a team of AI experts.

    In a digital economy where enterprise business models are increasingly interdependent, interconnection is essential to success. Equinix operates the only global interconnection platform, sparking new opportunities that are only possible when companies come together.

    Flexential

    The power density, connectivity, and reliability you need.

    You've made the investment in high-performance NVIDIA DGX™ systems. Now you require a high-performance data center to put your investment to work. Look no further than Flexential.

    Flexential is a hybrid IT solutions provider with a fleet of 40+ highly redundant data centers that span 18 markets across the U.S., including some of the fastest growing U.S. cities such as Portland, Denver, and Atlanta. Flexential’s facilities can handle your unique needs, whether it’s a single server or a multi-megawatt deployment. 

    Our data centers feature built-in security and compliance with 24/7 on-site security staff, site monitoring, and customizable cages and meet a variety of compliance requirements such as HITRUST, SOC 3 Type 2, ISO-27001, and ITAR.

    Subregions

    U.S. North, South, East, and West

    NTT Ltd.

    Global Data Centers is a division of NTT Ltd. Their global platform is one of the largest in the world. NTT is ranked as one of the top three leaders worldwide by IDC in their Colocation and Interconnection Services MarketScape, spanning more than 20 countries and regions, including North America, Europe, Africa, India, and APAC. As a neutral operator, they offer access to multiple cloud providers, a large variety of internet exchanges, and telecommunication network providers, including their own IPv6-compliant, tier 1 global IP network. Their clients benefit from tailored infrastructure and experience consistent best practices in design and operations across all of their reliable, scalable, and customizable data centers.

    ScaleMatrix

    ScaleMatrix provides variable-density colocation, cloud, connectivity, and managed services, delivered from data centers designed from the ground up to support the highest-density workloads. Each site allows clients to deploy 52 kilowatts per 45U cabinet, all at extremely competitive pricing.

    ScaleMatrix's Dynamic Density Control (DDC)-enabled data centers deliver such precisely controlled environments that IT hardware runs faster (more time in turbo mode) and longer (fewer failures from dust and thermal variation). These advancements deliver better performance, outcomes, and overall return on your IT investment.

    ScaleMatrix also offers cloud, storage, and business continuity and disaster recovery (BC/DR) services. Their Matrix TotalCare offering provides enhanced remote hands, including rack-and-stack, cabling, and break/fix support from their 24/7 Support Operations Centers, always answered by a live person. Remote-hosting clients have direct visibility into power, cooling, bandwidth reporting, and more through the ScalePanel portal.

    Locations boast software-defined network on-ramp services, providing connectivity to nearly any destination worldwide.

    Subregions

    U.S. West

    Contact

    www.scalematrix.com/nvidia

    nvidia@scalematrix.com

    ServerFarm is the data center provider focused on accelerating digital transformation through their unique InCommand offering. They provide services in real estate, data center management, and IT management, tailoring their capabilities to their customers’ requirements. Today, they own and operate data center space, including facilities in Amsterdam, London, Frankfurt, and Toronto. ServerFarm provides customers with easy access to energy-efficient, reliable, and agile solutions for all of their data center infrastructure needs.

    Vantage Data Centers is a leading North American wholesale data center provider in six strategic markets: Silicon Valley, California; Northern Virginia; Phoenix, Arizona; Quincy, Washington; and Montreal and Quebec City, Canada. Vantage provides highly scalable, flexible, and efficient data center solutions to hyperscale, cloud, and enterprise customers, offering unique value through their commitment to exceptional customer service and sustainability.

    atNorth

    atNorth is a leading Pan-Nordic data center services company that offers sustainable, cost-effective, and scalable high-performance computing across Iceland and Sweden. The company operates three data centers in strategic locations across the Nordics, while a fourth location is under construction in the north of Iceland. With sustainability at its core, atNorth's data centers run on 100 percent renewable energy resources and support circular economy principles. All atNorth sites leverage innovative design, power efficiency, and intelligent cluster operations to provide long-term infrastructure deployments. Their tailor-made solutions enable businesses to calculate, simulate, train, and visualize data workloads in an efficient, cost-optimized way.

    Kao Data

    Founded in 2014 and based just north of London in the U.K., Kao Data develops and operates advanced data centres for high-performance colocation.     MEGA D.C

    MEGA D.C. is a leading AI data center company, delivering advanced data center services purpose-built for modern AI workloads.

    Our mission is to develop a new generation of AI data centers and a supporting ecosystem, specifically designed to accelerate AI adoption at scale.

    Serving a diverse customer base, including hyperscalers, NVIDIA Cloud Partners, academic institutions, and AI startups, our integrated team is laser-focused on designing, building, and operating highly efficient, cutting-edge critical high density data center facilities that enable organizations to thrive in the AI era.

     Liquid Cooled Ready

    NTT Ltd.

    Global Data Centers is a division of NTT Ltd. Their global platform is one of the largest in the world. NTT is ranked as one of the top three leaders worldwide by IDC in their Colocation and Interconnection Services MarketScape, spanning more than 20 countries and regions, including North America, Europe, Africa, India, and APAC.

    As a neutral operator, they offer access to multiple cloud providers, a large variety of internet exchanges, and telecommunication network providers, including their own IPv6-compliant, tier 1 global IP network. Their clients benefit from tailored infrastructure and experience consistent best practices in design and operations across all of their reliable, scalable, and customizable data centers.

    Subregions

    ServerFarm is the data center provider focused on accelerating digital transformation through their unique InCommand offering. They provide services in real estate, data center management, and IT management, tailoring their capabilities to their customers’ requirements. Today, they own and operate data center space, including facilities in Amsterdam, London, and Toronto. ServerFarm provides customers with easy access to energy-efficient, reliable, and agile solutions for all of their data center infrastructure needs.

Strategically located at major regional trade hubs, their world-class facilities provide a home for all your business-critical data and access to a hub of leading cloud providers, carriers, and enterprises. Proudly African, they’re dedicated to driving digital innovation for the benefit of everybody.

    Teraco

    Teraco is the first provider of highly resilient, vendor-neutral data environments in sub-Saharan Africa. With their world-class data center infrastructure and network-dense ecosystems, Teraco forms a vital part of the African internet’s backbone and is essential to the modern enterprise’s digital transformation strategy. Teraco is part-owned by Digital Realty—offering clients a global data center platform designed to enable digital businesses to scale within a highly connected data community across over 285 data centers in 50 metros and 26 countries on six continents—and a consortium of private equity investors, including Berkshire Partners LLC and Permira.

    Digital Realty

    Digital Realty is the largest provider of data center colocation services globally. Digital Realty brings companies and data together by delivering the full spectrum of high-performance data center, colocation, and interconnection solutions required to support your NVIDIA DGX™ systems. PlatformDIGITAL, the company’s global data center platform, provides customers with a secure data “meeting place” for powering innovation and efficiently managing data gravity challenges.

    Digital Realty’s software-defined networking (SDN)-based ServiceFabric solution is designed to support the wider industry shift to data-centric architecture and act as a global orchestration platform to manage global connectivity. NVIDIA DGX customers can securely host critical infrastructure and datasets, connect to whom they need, and deploy and manage their infrastructure where they need it to enable new workflows and unlock new business outcomes.

    Digital Realty gives their customers access to the connected communities that matter to them with a global data center footprint of 305+ facilities in 50+ metros across 27 countries on six continents.

    Sify's infrastructure comprises the largest MPLS network, 14 data centers of concurrently-maintainable standards, partnerships with global technology companies, and vast expertise in business transformation solutions modeled for the cloud, making it the first choice of startups, SMBs, mid-market, and large enterprises.

    More than 10,000 businesses across multiple verticals have taken advantage of their unassailable trinity of data centers, networks, and digital services and conduct their business seamlessly across India.     Global Switch

    Global Switch is a leading owner, operator, and developer of large-scale carrier- and cloud-neutral data centers across Europe and Asia. The company’s facilities are designed to support the most demanding AI workloads, providing NVIDIA customers with:

    • High-density capacity: purpose-built, flexible infrastructure optimized for NVIDIA DGX systems, ensuring seamless scalability 
    • Proven expertise: extensive experience in deploying and managing high-performance GPU clusters 
    • Advanced cooling solutions: capability to support both high-density air or liquid cooling to suit the power and thermal demands of AI and HPC workloads
    • Strategic locations: a global footprint in key technology hubs, offering low-latency access to major cloud and network providers

    By combining technical excellence with robust operational reliability, Global Switch is the trusted choice for customers seeking to accelerate AI innovation.

    NVIDIA and our third-party partners use cookies and other tools to collect and record information you provide as well as information about your interactions with our websites for performance improvement, analytics, and to assist in our marketing efforts. By clicking "Accept All", you consent to our use of cookies and other tools as described in our Cookie Policy. You can manage your cookie settings by clicking on "Manage Settings". Please see our Privacy Policy for more information on our privacy practices.

    We have detected the Global Privacy Control (GPC) signal and recorded your rejection of all optional cookies on this site for this browser. You can manage your cookie settings by clicking on "Manage Settings". Please see our Cookie Policy for more information and visit our Privacy Policy for details on our privacy practices.

    Cookie Settings

    We and our third-party partners (including social media, advertising, and analytics partners) use cookies and other tracking technologies to collect, store, monitor, and process certain information about you when you visit our website. The information collected might relate to you, your preferences, or your device. We use that information to make the site work and with your consent to analyze performance and traffic on our website, to provide a more personalized web experience, and assist in our marketing efforts.

    Click on the different category headings below to find out more and change the settings according to your preference. You cannot opt out of Required Cookies as they are deployed to ensure the proper functioning of our website (such as prompting the cookie banner and remembering your settings, etc.). By clicking "Save and Accept" at the bottom, you consent to the use of cookies and other tools as described in our Cookie Policy in accordance with your settings. For more information about our privacy practices, please see our Privacy Policy.

    Required Cookies

    Always Active

    These cookies enable core functionality such as security, network management, and accessibility. These cookies are required for the site to function and cannot be turned off.

    Performance Cookies

    These cookies are used to provide quantitative measures of our website visitors, such as the number of times you visit, time on page, your mouse movements, scrolling, clicks and keystroke activity on the websites; other browsing, search, or product research behavior; and what brought you to our site. These cookies may store a unique ID so that our system will remember you when you return. Information collected with these cookies is used to measure and find ways to improve website performance.

    Personalization Cookies

    These cookies collect data about how you have interacted with our website to help us improve your web experience, such as which pages you have visited. These cookies may store a unique ID so that our system will remember you when you return. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. These cookies enable us to provide enhanced website functionality and personalization as well as make the marketing messages we send to you more relevant to your interests. If you do not allow these cookies, then some or all of these services may not function properly.

    Advertising Cookies

    These cookies record your visit to our websites, the pages you have visited and the links you have followed to influence the advertisements that you see on other websites. These cookies and the information they collect may be managed by other companies, including our advertising partners, and may be used to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant advertising on other sites. We and our advertising partners will use this information to make our websites and the advertising displayed on it, more relevant to your interests.
